title: phlegmariurus serpentiformis
intro: Phlegmariurus serpentiformis, also known as serpent fern, is a species of lycopod, a type of vascular plant that belongs to the club moss family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Phlegmariurus serpentiformis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant require further scientific evaluation.
